mapper.select:
SELECT d.id AS drugId, d.drug_code AS drugCode, d.drug_name AS drugName, d.spec, d.unit, s.quantity, s.warn_quantity AS warnQuantity, (s.quantity <= s.warn_quantity) AS lowStock FROM drug_stock s JOIN drug d ON d.id = s.drug_id
AND s.quantity <= s.warn_quantity
ORDER BY s.quantity
SELECT * FROM drug_stock WHERE drug_id = #{drugId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drug_stock (drug_id, quantity, warn_quantity) VALUES (#{drugId}, #{quantity}, #{warnQuantity})
mapper.update: UPDATE drug_stock SET quantity = quantity - #{qty} WHERE drug_id = #{drugId} AND quantity >= #{qty}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drug_stock WHERE quantity <= warn_quantity
